news.title: Revised Academic Activities for 2025/2026 Second Semester
news.summary: Updated workshop rotation, practical assessment windows, and semester milestones are now active across all schools.

news.title: Convocation Week Events and Guest Lectures Announced
news.summary: Institutional leadership confirms the 17th convocation week activity schedule with industry keynote sessions.

news.title: Postgraduate Technical Programs: Application Window Open
news.summary: Applications are now open for advanced technical specialization tracks for the next academic cycle.

news.title: Industry Partnership Lab Launched for Apprenticeship Placement
news.summary: The institute has launched a new placement pipeline with partner workshops and technical service firms.

events.title: Skills Showcase and Open Lab Day
events.summary: Prospective applicants can visit workshops and engage live with instructors and student projects.

events.title: Admissions Guidance Clinic
events.summary: One-on-one advisory session for applicants on program selection and enrollment pathways.

events.title: Entrepreneurship Bootcamp
events.summary: Business startup strategy sessions for trainees preparing for self-employment after graduation.

events.title: Faculty-Industry Roundtable
events.summary: Advisory board meeting with partner employers on curriculum relevance and placement opportunities.
